# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type EdgeConfigValues = {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS: Record<string, boolean>;
};

const DEFAULTS: EdgeConfigValues = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {},
};

async function readEdgeConfig(): Promise<Partial<EdgeConfigValues>> {
  const connectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!connectionString) {
    return {};
  }

  try {
    const { get } = await import('@vercel/edge-config');

    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags] = await Promise.all([
      get<string>('API_KEY'),
      get<string>('DB_URL'),
      get<Record<string, boolean>>('FEATURE_FLAGS'),
    ]);

    return {
      API_KEY: typeof apiKey === 'string' && apiKey.length > 0 ? apiKey : undefined,
      DB_URL: typeof dbUrl === 'string' && dbUrl.length > 0 ? dbUrl : undefined,
      FEATURE_FLAGS:
        featureFlags && typeof featureFlags === 'object' ? featureFlags : undefined,
    };
  } catch {
    return {};
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const edgeConfig = await readEdgeConfig();

  const configValues: EdgeConfigValues = {
    API_KEY: edgeConfig.API_KEY ?? DEFAULTS.API_KEY,
    DB_URL: edgeConfig.DB_URL ?? DEFAULTS.DB_URL,
    FEATURE_FLAGS: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS ?? DEFAULTS.FEATURE_FLAGS,
  };

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const flag = url.searchParams.get('flag');

  const response = {
    edgeConfigConnected: Boolean(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG),
    apiKey: configValues.API_KEY,
    dbUrl: configValues.DB_URL,
    featureFlags: configValues.FEATURE_FLAGS,
    requestedFlag: flag,
    requestedFlagEnabled: flag ? Boolean(configValues.FEATURE_FLAGS[flag]) : null,
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(response, null, 2), {
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
      'cache-control': 'no-store',
    },
    status: 200,
  });
}
